messages.content: 重写：The textural properties of all the catalysts were investigated by N2 adsorption-desorption measurements. The pore structure data and pore size distribution of the catalysts are shown in Fig. 3 and Table S1.

By conducting N2 adsorption-desorption measurements, we analyzed the textural characteristics of every catalyst. The pore structure details and pore size distribution of each catalyst can be found in Table S1 and illustrated in Fig. 3.
语法检测：With the increase of Ni NPs from 5.3 to 11.7 nm, the ratio of dimethyl butanes to methyl pentane rose from 0.025 to 0.053.
没有语法错误。
英文更地道一些：With the increase of Ni NPs from 5.3 to 11.7 nm, the ratio of dimethyl butanes to methyl pentane rise from 0.025 to 0.053.
"As the size of Ni NPs increased from 5.3 to 11.7 nm, the ratio of dimethyl butanes to methyl pentane also increased, from 0.025 to 0.053."
rise from什么意思
"rise from" 的意思是“从...上升”。在这个句子中，它表示存在一个随着Ni NPs尺寸增加而增加的趋势。
描述去掉from:With the increase of Ni NPs from 5.3 to 11.7 nm
"With the increase of Ni NPs to 11.7 nm from 5.3 nm"

英文润色：the decrease in surface area and pore volume over the Ni/SAPO-11 catalysts was due to the attack of solvent molecules to the framework and the blocking effect of metal species on the pores of the molecular sieve

Here is a slightly revised version:

"The decrease in surface area and pore volume of the Ni/SAPO-11 catalysts was attributed to the interaction between solvent molecules and the framework, as well as the blocking effect of metal species on the pores of the molecular sieve."
英文重写：In addition, the band around 2070 cm–1 could be attributed to the linearly adsorbed CO on high-coordinated terrace Ni sites
Moreover, the band observed at 2070 cm–1 can be attributed to CO linearly adsorbed on the high-coordinated terrace Ni sites.

英文重写：The results of CO-adsorbed FTIR indicated that the geometric structure of the nickel clusters over the catalyst was significantly affected by the Ni particle size, which may impact the catalytic performance

The CO-adsorbed FTIR results highlighted that the catalytic performance could potentially be affected by the geometric structure of the nickel clusters on the catalyst, which was found to be significantly influenced by the Ni particle size.

把which替换掉：The results of CO-adsorbed FTIR indicated that the geometric structure of the nickel clusters over the catalyst was significantly affected by the Ni particle size, which may impact the catalytic performance

The results of CO-adsorbed FTIR indicated that the geometric structure of the nickel clusters over the catalyst was significantly affected by the Ni particle size. This observation suggests that the catalytic performance may be impacted.
合成一句话

"The CO-adsorbed FTIR results suggested that the catalytic performance of the nickel clusters over the catalyst was significantly influenced by the Ni particle size through the observed changes in geometric structure."
英文重写：The curves were deconvoluted into three peaks by fitting the profiles with Gaussian functions.
By fitting the profiles with Gaussian functions, the curves were separated into three distinct peaks.

英文降重：It is found that a consistent decrease in TOF as the Ni particle size increases. The result indicates the apparent dependence of catalytic activity on Ni particle size in this reaction. The relationship between the fraction of Ni corner/step sites and the TOF value is presented in Fig. 10b. A positive proportional relationship between the parameters is observed.

"We observed a decrease in TOF with increasing Ni particle size, indicating that catalytic activity is dependent on Ni particle size for this reaction.  Figure 10b reveals a positive correlation between the fraction of Ni corner/step sites and the TOF value."
不用第一人称

"A consistent decrease in TOF was observed with increasing Ni particle size, suggesting that the catalytic activity is dependent on the size of the Ni particles. Figure 10b illustrates a positive correlation between the fraction of Ni corner/step sites and the TOF value."
英文降重：The catalytic performances of the Ni/SAPO-11 catalysts reveal that the mass activity and generation rate of desired isomers increased with a decrease in Ni particle size.
"The catalytic performance of the Ni/SAPO-11 catalysts demonstrated an increase in both the mass activity and generation rate of desired isomers as the size of the Ni particles decreased."
英文重写：The product distribution could also be adjusted by varying the Ni particle size. The ratio of DMB to MP increased from 0.025 to 0.053 with increasing the Ni particle size (5.3 to 11.7 nm).

"The Ni particle size was found to be a factor in adjusting the product distribution such that the ratio of DMB to MP increased from 0.025 to 0.053 when the particle size increased from 5.3 to 11.7 nm."
英文重写：The product distribution could also be adjusted by varying the Ni particle size.
"Varying the particle size of Ni also resulted in an adjustable product distribution."

英文降重：Small Ni pSmall Ni particles possessed a higher amount of Ni sites and a higher proportion of low-coordinated corner/step Ni sitesarticles possessed a higher amount of Ni sites and a higher proportion of low-coordinated corner/step Ni sites
"Smaller Ni particles had a larger number of Ni sites and a greater proportion of low-coordinated corner/step Ni sites."

更改句式：In conclusion, increasing the Ni particle size in Ni/SAPO-11 catalysts significantly improved the TOF of n-hexane dehydrogenation and enhanced the selectivity to MP. Further analyses indicate that increasing the Ni particle size affected the acid catalyzed steps by promoting the intermediate’s timely hydrogenation.

To conclude, the increase in Ni particle size of Ni/SAPO-11 catalysts was observed to significantly enhance the TOF of n-hexane dehydrogenation and improve the selectivity to MP. Subsequent analyses suggest that the larger particle size promoted timely hydrogenation of intermediates, thereby influencing the acid catalyzed steps.

英文重写：The results of CO-adsorbed FTIR indicated that as the cluster size decreases, the corner and edge atoms accounts for a higher fraction of the cluster. Therefore, a difference in the surface properties of the catalyst would result from the increase in the fraction of undercoordinated sites on the surface

"The CO-adsorbed FTIR results highlighted that a reduced cluster size led to a higher percentage of corner and edge atoms within the cluster. Consequently, an increase in the fraction of undercoordinated sites on the surface resulted in a variation of surface properties for the catalyst."
英文优化：a difference in the surface properties of the catalyst would result from the increase in the fraction of undercoordinated sites on the surface
"The increase in the fraction of under-coordinated sites on the surface of the catalyst resulted in a variation of surface properties."
英文重写：a difference in the surface properties of the catalyst
"A variation in the properties of the catalyst surface."
再优化
"Changes to the surface properties of the catalyst."
英文重写：result from the increase in the fraction of undercoordinated sites on the surface
"Occurred due to the increase in the proportion of undercoordinated sites on the surface."
优化：The analysis of the adsorption/activation ability of Ni on hydrogen over the catalyst were investigated by H2-TPD measurement
"The H2-TPD measurement was employed to examine the catalytic performance of Ni in hydrogen adsorption and activation over the catalyst."

语法检查：The highly dispersed of the Ni over the Ni/SAPO-11-L4 catalyst possess higher amount of Ni sites for hexane hydrogenation and alkene intermediates timely hydrogenation than that of the catalysts with larger Ni particles.

The sentence contains some errors in grammar and wording. Here's a corrected version: 

"The Ni atoms, which were highly dispersed over the Ni/SAPO-11-L4 catalyst, possessed a larger number of Ni sites for hexane hydrogenation and timely hydrogenation of alkene intermediates compared to catalysts with larger Ni particles."
